diff --git a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/command_policy.ex b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/command_policy.ex
new file mode 100644
index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..bb00efddd22b8ae7a56038c4d1b9e02893e379f8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/command_policy.ex
@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+defmodule SymphonyElixir.Codex.CommandPolicy do
+  @moduledoc """
+  Enforces integration boundaries on commands requested by BOS AgentRuns.
+
+  This policy is deliberately evaluated on the complete shell command before
+  Codex receives permission to launch it. Host-side workspace hooks and other
+  Symphony administration do not pass through this module.
+  """
+
+  @type denial :: %{
+          reason: String.t(),
+          suggested_operation: String.t(),
+          policy: String.t()
+        }
+
+  @gh_token ~r/(?:^|\s)(?:[^\s;|&()]*\/)?gh(?:\s|$|[;|&()])/i
+  @github_api ~r/(?:https?:\/\/)?api\.github\.com(?:[\/:?#]|$)/i
+
+  @doc """
+  Returns a denial for direct GitHub integration commands and `:allow` for
+  commands that remain inside the supported BOS boundary.
+  """
+  @spec evaluate(term()) :: :allow | {:deny, denial()}
+  def evaluate(command) when is_list(command), do: command |> Enum.join(" ") |> evaluate()
+
+  def evaluate(command) when is_binary(command) do
+    normalized = normalize(command)
+
+    cond do
+      Regex.match?(@gh_token, normalized) ->
+        {:deny,
+         %{
+           policy: "bos.integration.github.v1",
+           reason: "Direct GitHub CLI execution is prohibited for BOS AgentRuns.",
+           suggested_operation: gh_replacement(normalized)
+         }}
+
+      Regex.match?(@github_api, normalized) ->
+        {:deny,
+         %{
+           policy: "bos.integration.github.v1",
+           reason: "Direct GitHub REST or GraphQL access is prohibited for BOS AgentRuns.",
+           suggested_operation: api_replacement(normalized)
+         }}
+
+      true ->
+        :allow
+    end
+  end
+
+  def evaluate(_command), do: :allow
+
+  defp normalize(command) do
+    command
+    |> String.replace(~r/["'\\]/, "")
+    |> String.replace(~r/\s+/, " ")
+    |> String.trim()
+    |> String.downcase()
+  end
+
+  defp gh_replacement(command) do
+    cond do
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:create|edit)/, command) -> "bos_create_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:merge|close)/, command) -> "bos_request_merge"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:checks|status)/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request_checks"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\b/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+issue\b/, command) -> "bos_get_issue"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+release\b/, command) -> "bos_create_release"
+      true -> "the corresponding bos-mcp domain operation"
+    end
+  end
+
+  defp api_replacement(command) do
+    cond do
+      String.contains?(command, "/pulls") or String.contains?(command, "/graphql") ->
+        "bos_get_pull_request or the corresponding bos-mcp pull-request operation"
+
+      String.contains?(command, "/issues") ->
+        "bos_get_issue or the corresponding bos-mcp issue operation"
+
+      String.contains?(command, "/deployments") ->
+        "bos_create_deployment or the corresponding bos-mcp deployment operation"
+
+      String.contains?(command, "/releases") ->
+        "bos_create_release"
+
+

payload.outputSummary:
end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "item/commandExecution/requestApproval",
         %{"id" => id} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    approve_or_require(
      port,
      id,
      "acceptForSession",
      payload,
      payload_string,
      on_message,
      metadata,
      auto_approve_requests
    )
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "item/tool/call",
         %{"id" => id, "params" => params} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         tool_executor,
         _auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    tool_name = tool_call_name(params)
    arguments = tool_call_arguments(params)

    result =
      tool_name
      |> tool_executor.(arguments)
      |> normalize_dynamic_tool_result()

    send_message(port, %{
      "id" => id,
      "result" => result
    })

    event =
      case result do
        %{"success" => true} -> :tool_call_completed
        _ when is_nil(tool_name) -> :unsupported_tool_call
        _ -> :tool_call_failed
      end

    emit_message(on_message, event, %{payload: payload, raw: payload_string}, metadata)

    :approved
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "execCommandApproval",
         %{"id" => id} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    approve_or_require(
      port,
      id,
      "approved_for_session",
      payload,
      payload_string,
      on_message,
      metadata,
      auto_approve_requests
    )
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "applyPatchApproval",
         %{"id" => id} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    approve_or_re

item.aggregatedOutput:
end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "item/tool/call",
         %{"id" => id, "params" => params} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         tool_executor,
         _auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    tool_name = tool_call_name(params)
    arguments = tool_call_arguments(params)

    result =
      tool_name
      |> tool_executor.(arguments)
      |> normalize_dynamic_tool_result()

    send_message(port, %{
      "id" => id,
      "result" => result
    })

    event =
      case result do
        %{"success" => true} -> :tool_call_completed
        _ when is_nil(tool_name) -> :unsupported_tool_call
        _ -> :tool_call_failed
      end

    emit_message(on_message, event, %{payload: payload, raw: payload_string}, metadata)

    :approved
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "execCommandApproval",
         %{"id" => id} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    approve_or_require(
      port,
      id,
      "approved_for_session",
      payload,
      payload_string,
      on_message,
      metadata,
      auto_approve_requests
    )
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "applyPatchApproval",
         %{"id" => id} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    approve_or_require(
      port,
      id,
      "approved_for_session",
      payload,
      payload_string,
      on_message,
      metadata,
      auto_approve_requests
    )
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "item/fileChange/requestApproval",
         %{"id" => id} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    approve_or_require(
      port,
      id,
      "acceptForSession",
      payload,
      payload_string,
      on_message,
      metadata,
      auto_approve_requests
    )
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         port,
         "item/tool/requestUserInput",
         %{"id" => id, "params" => params} = payload,
         payload_string,
         on_message,
         metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    maybe_auto_answer_tool_request_user_input(
      port,
      id,
      params,
      payload,
      payload_string,
      on_message,
      metadata,
      auto_approve_requests
    )
  end

  defp maybe_handle_approval_request(
         _port,
         _method,
         _payload,
         _payload_string,
         _on_message,
         _metadata,
         _tool_executor,
         _auto_approve_requests
       ) do
    :unhandled
  end

  defp normalize_dynamic_tool_result(%{"success" => success} = result) when is_boolean(success) do
    output =
      case Map.get(result, "output") do
        existing_output when is_binary(existing_output) -> existing_output
        _ -> dynamic_tool_output(result)
      end

    content_items =
      case Map.get(result, "contentItems") do
        existing_items when is_list(existing_items) -> existing_items
        _ -> dynamic_tool_content_items(output)
      end

    result
    |> Map.put("output", output)
    |> Map.put("contentItems", content_items)
  end

  defp normalize_dynamic_tool_result(result) do
    %{
      "success" => false,
      "output" => inspect(result),
      "contentItems" => dynamic_tool_content_items(inspect(result))
    }
  end

  defp dynamic_tool_output(%{"contentItems" => [%{"text" => text} | _]}) when is_binary(text), do: text
  defp dynamic_tool_output(result), do: Jason.encode!(result, pretty: true)

  defp dynamic_tool_content_items(output) when is_binary(output) do
    [
      %{
        "type" => "inputText",

diff --git a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/command_policy.ex b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/command_policy.ex

index 0000000000000000000000000000000000000000..bb00efddd22b8ae7a56038c4d1b9e02893e379f8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/command_policy.ex
@@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
+defmodule SymphonyElixir.Codex.CommandPolicy do
+  @moduledoc """
+  Enforces integration boundaries on commands requested by BOS AgentRuns.
+
+  This policy is deliberately evaluated on the complete shell command before
+  Codex receives permission to launch it. Host-side workspace hooks and other
+  Symphony administration do not pass through this module.
+  """
+
+  @type denial :: %{
+          reason: String.t(),
+          suggested_operation: String.t(),
+          policy: String.t()
+        }
+
+  @gh_token ~r/(?:^|\s)(?:[^\s;|&()]*\/)?gh(?:\s|$|[;|&()])/i
+  @github_api ~r/(?:https?:\/\/)?api\.github\.com(?:[\/:?#]|$)/i
+
+  @doc """
+  Returns a denial for direct GitHub integration commands and `:allow` for
+  commands that remain inside the supported BOS boundary.
+  """
+  @spec evaluate(term()) :: :allow | {:deny, denial()}
+  def evaluate(command) when is_list(command), do: command |> Enum.join(" ") |> evaluate()
+
+  def evaluate(command) when is_binary(command) do
+    normalized = normalize(command)
+
+    cond do
+      Regex.match?(@gh_token, normalized) ->
+        {:deny,
+         %{
+           policy: "bos.integration.github.v1",
+           reason: "Direct GitHub CLI execution is prohibited for BOS AgentRuns.",
+           suggested_operation: gh_replacement(normalized)
+         }}
+
+      Regex.match?(@github_api, normalized) ->
+        {:deny,
+         %{
+           policy: "bos.integration.github.v1",
+           reason: "Direct GitHub REST or GraphQL access is prohibited for BOS AgentRuns.",
+           suggested_operation: api_replacement(normalized)
+         }}
+
+      true ->
+        :allow
+    end
+  end
+
+  def evaluate(_command), do: :allow
+
+  defp normalize(command) do
+    command
+    |> String.replace(~r/["'\\]/, "")
+    |> String.replace(~r/\s+/, " ")
+    |> String.trim()
+    |> String.downcase()
+  end
+
+  defp gh_replacement(command) do
+    cond do
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:create|edit)/, command) -> "bos_create_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:merge|close)/, command) -> "bos_request_merge"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\s+(?:checks|status)/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request_checks"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+pr\b/, command) -> "bos_get_pull_request"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+issue\b/, command) -> "bos_get_issue"
+      Regex.match?(~r/(?:^|\s)gh\s+release\b/, command) -> "bos_create_release"
+      true -> "the corresponding bos-mcp domain operation"
+    end
+  end
+
+  defp api_replacement(command) do
+    cond do
+      String.contains?(command, "/pulls") or String.contains?(command, "/graphql") ->
+        "bos_get_pull_request or the corresponding bos-mcp pull-request operation"
+
+      String.contains?(command, "/issues") ->
+        "bos_get_issue or the corresponding bos-mcp issue operation"
+
+      String.contains?(command, "/deployments") ->
+        "bos_create_deployment or the corresponding bos-mcp deployment operation"
+
+      String.contains?(command, "/releases") ->
+        "bos_create_release"
+
+

+  defp enforce_or_approve_command(
+         port,
+         id,
+         approval_decision,
+         denial_decision,
+         payload,
+         payload_string,
+         on_message,
+         metadata,
+         auto_approve_requests,
+         issue
+       ) do
+    command = get_in(payload, ["params", "command"]) || get_in(payload, ["params", "argv"])
+
+    case if(bos_agent_run?(issue), do: CommandPolicy.evaluate(command), else: :allow) do
+      {:deny, denial} ->
+        message = "Blocked by #{denial.policy}. Use bos-mcp operation #{denial.suggested_operation}."
+
+        send_message(port, %{
+          "id" => id,
+          "result" => %{"decision" => denial_decision, "reason" => message}
+        })
+
+        emit_message(
+          on_message,
+          :command_policy_blocked,
+          %{
+            payload: %{
+              "method" => "bos/commandPolicy/blocked",
+              "params" => %{
+                "command" => command,
+                "policy" => denial.policy,
+                "reason" => denial.reason,
+                "suggestedOperation" => denial.suggested_operation
+              }
+            },
+            raw: payload_string,
+            decision: denial_decision
+          },
+          metadata
+        )
+
+        :approved
+
+      :allow ->
+        approve_or_require(
+          port,
+          id,
+          approval_decision,
+          payload,
+          payload_string,
+          on_message,
+          metadata,
+          auto_approve_requests
+        )
+    end
+  end
+
+  defp bos_agent_run?(%{native_ref: native_ref}) when is_map(native_ref) do
+    is_binary(native_ref["runId"]) and is_binary(native_ref["repositoryId"])
+  end
+
+  defp bos_agent_run?(_issue), do: false
+
   defp normalize_dynamic_tool_result(%{"success" => success} = result) when is_boolean(success) do
